reviews.comment:
La comida está muy bien, el agua caliente para el mate es gratis y los baños están muy bien cuidados.

(Translated by Google)
The food is very good, the hot water for mate is free, and the bathrooms are very well maintained.

reviews.comment:
Me robaron cargando con la tarjeta de débito 90mil pesos. Playero sabes que voy a volver y me los vas a devolver.

(Translated by Google)
I was robbed while carrying 90,000 pesos on my debit card. Playero, you know I'm coming back and you're going to give it back to me.

reviews.comment:
Como ya nos tienen acostumbrados,  las YPF ACA son una isla de ciudad en el medio del viaje atravesado por campo y ruta. Gracias por la buena atención y amabilidad de sus empleados .

(Translated by Google)
As we've come to expect, YPF ACA stations are a welcome oasis in the middle of a journey through countryside and highway. Thank you for the excellent service and friendliness of your staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBeFl6MkdREAE
